stable_candidate_rule: train/validation/oos no-cost > 0; every split trade_count >= min_trade_count; OOS cost-aware net_pnl >= 0 or explicitly marked low-frequency small cost-drag exception; every split max_ddpercent <= max_ddpercent_threshold.
oos_cost_exception_rule: trade_count <= low_frequency_trade_count, no_cost > 0, net_pnl < 0, cost_drag > 0, and abs(oos_net_pnl) <= max_explainable_oos_cost_loss_to_no_cost * oos_no_cost_net_pnl.
